reference: Hi, I was wondering what the chances of having colon cancer are. I had a computed tomography scan with contrast, and it showed something on my colon. I also feel like someone has punched me in my stomach and I have left lower quadrant pain. Other than a weird feeling around my navel, I show no other signs.
